raw_drop_reasons.airingSchedule: nested schedule nodes; not required for current pre-release baseline target engineering
raw_drop_reasons.bannerImage: auxiliary media field; baseline uses tabular contract and defers image handling to dedicated stage
raw_drop_reasons.chapters: manga-oriented field; 100% missing for this anime-focused pipeline
raw_drop_reasons.characters: high-cardinality nested structure; deferred to dedicated retrieval/graph feature stage
raw_drop_reasons.coverImage_color: auxiliary color metadata; low impact baseline feature and missingness present
raw_drop_reasons.coverImage_extraLarge: raw media URL variant; excluded from baseline tabular contract
raw_drop_reasons.coverImage_large: raw media URL variant; excluded from baseline tabular contract
raw_drop_reasons.coverImage_medium: tracked in RQ coverage analysis but not used as direct tabular scalar feature
raw_drop_reasons.description: kept for RQ readiness analysis but excluded from baseline tabular feature set (reserved for text encoder stage)
raw_drop_reasons.endDate_day: post-release endpoint detail not required for pre-release feature contract
raw_drop_reasons.endDate_month: post-release endpoint detail not required for pre-release feature contract
raw_drop_reasons.endDate_year: post-release endpoint detail not required for pre-release feature contract
raw_drop_reasons.externalLinks: nested external metadata; excluded to keep baseline feature contract compact
raw_drop_reasons.hashtag: high missingness and unstable social metadata
raw_drop_reasons.idMal: external ID mapping field; excluded from baseline predictive feature set
raw_drop_reasons.isFavourite: user-level interaction flag; unstable and potentially leakage-prone
raw_drop_reasons.isLicensed: platform/legal flag not required in current baseline contract
raw_drop_reasons.isLocked: platform operational flag; not semantically meaningful for target task
raw_drop_reasons.nextAiringEpisode: post-schedule dynamic field; excluded to avoid temporal inconsistency/leakage risk
raw_drop_reasons.rankings: nested ranking history; may introduce post-release leakage and high variance
raw_drop_reasons.recommendations: nested recommendation graph payload; excluded from baseline tabular preprocessing
raw_drop_reasons.relations: graph-style payload dropped as raw nested JSON; key sequel/prequel signals are distilled into structured interim relation features
raw_drop_reasons.reviews: nested text payload with variable quality/length; deferred to dedicated NLP stage
raw_drop_reasons.seasonInt: redundant encoded season field; season + seasonYear retained
raw_drop_reasons.siteUrl: identifier-style URL field; non-semantic for baseline model input
raw_drop_reasons.staff: high-cardinality nested structure; deferred to dedicated retrieval/graph feature stage
raw_drop_reasons.stats_scoreDistribution: aggregated platform distribution payload; excluded from row-level baseline contract
raw_drop_reasons.stats_statusDistribution: aggregated platform distribution payload; excluded from row-level baseline contract
raw_drop_reasons.streamingEpisodes: nested streaming payload; not stable for pre-release baseline feature contract
raw_drop_reasons.synonyms: high-variance synonym list; deferred to dedicated text normalization stage
raw_drop_reasons.tags: high-cardinality nested tags; deferred to dedicated text/tag embedding pipeline
raw_drop_reasons.title_userPreferred: redundant with retained title fields and may vary by locale/user preference
raw_drop_reasons.trailer_id: retained as availability metric in EDA but excluded from baseline tabular contract to avoid sparse-noisy key field
raw_drop_reasons.trailer_site: sparse categorical trailer metadata; deferred to multimodal source availability analysis
raw_drop_reasons.trailer_thumbnail: media URL field; excluded from baseline tabular contract
raw_drop_reasons.updatedAt: platform update timestamp; can encode non-stationary platform behavior
raw_drop_reasons.volumes: manga-oriented field; 100% missing for this anime-focused pipeline

multimodal_add_reasons.bannerImage: reintroduced from raw as optional image modality for multimodal training
multimodal_add_reasons.coverImage_medium: reintroduced from raw for image encoder input in multimodal training
multimodal_add_reasons.description: reintroduced from raw for text encoder input in multimodal training
multimodal_add_reasons.trailer_id: reintroduced from raw as trailer source key for optional video branch
multimodal_add_reasons.trailer_site: reintroduced from raw as trailer platform metadata
multimodal_add_reasons.trailer_thumbnail: reintroduced from raw as trailer preview image field
